name: Priya Sharma
quote: The trek down to the double-decker root bridge was the hardest, best thing we've done. Our host knew every village on the way.

name: Rahul & Megha
quote: Yumthang valley in bloom, permits all sorted before we landed — we didn't touch a single form. Stress-free from start to finish.

name: Arjun Khanna
quote: Sela Pass at sunrise and the morning prayers at Tawang monastery — the pacing of this itinerary shows they actually know the mountains.

name: Sneha Thomas
quote: We saw eleven rhinos and a tiger crossing the jeep track. The naturalist made it feel like a wildlife documentary we were inside of.

name: Imran Ali
quote: Landed at Bagdogra, driver was waiting with my name, clean Innova, and we were in Darjeeling for sunset. Fare was exactly what they quoted.

name: Aarti Patel
quote: Apatani villages, paddy-fish fields, and a homestay that felt like family. Knocked one star only because I wished it were two days longer!
